case_title: KRYSTEENA MORAGA VS. JEFFREY L KATZ

DECLARATION OF AMENDED CLAIM RE AMOUNT OF CLAIM FROM $2000 TO $2270. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORAGA, KRYSTEENA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MELINEH ZOHRABIAN--OFFICE MANAGER.
